summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ENDAYE Aimé portfolio with dark blue data-oriented theme. All requested features working correctly on localhost. Critical deployment issue persists with external URL.

critical_bugs.issue: Public URL https://endayeaime-portfolio-ea-2ql1.preview.emergentagent.com shows 'Preview Unavailable!!!' instead of portfolio
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot access portfolio via public URL - complete deployment failure

passed_tests: Hero section with 'Disponible pour opportunités' badge (localhost)
Name 'ENDAYE Aimé' with gradient text effect on 'Aimé'
Navigation with hover underline effects (4 nav links working)
Skills section with 6 colored icon categories (Langages & Outils, Machine Learning, Data Engineering, Visualisation, Applications Web, Méthodologies)
Projects section with 8 projects featuring images and icons
Contact section with 5 contact methods and glassmorphism styling
Mobile responsive design with working hamburger menu
Dark blue data-oriented theme with grid background
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL DEPLOYMENT ISSUE: The external public URL shows 'Preview Unavailable!!!' instead of the portfolio. This is preventing any user access to the application. The portfolio works perfectly on localhost but fails completely on the public URL. This appears to be a deployment/service configuration issue that needs immediate attention.
